MISCELLANEOUS ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-17-2008 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Order to Show Cause to Plaintiff in Propria Persona for failure to Arbitrate is heard this day. There being no appearance nor objection, and having reviewed the file, the court finds no good cause or substantial justification for plaintiff's failure to comply with the court's orders and rules. Therefore, it is hereby ordered that this matter be dismissed. The court finds that a less severe sanction would not be effective due to the history of lack of compliance. Proceedings reported by: Leticia Perez, CSR# 7782. (212)
